commit.message:
fix: shell injection, duplicate config, silent status errors

TASK-03: Fix shell injection in createUserOnServer/deleteUserFromServer
- Replace fmt.Sprintf interpolation into shell strings with positional
  arguments passed via /bin/sh -c '...' _ arg1 arg2
- Credentials are never interpolated into the shell script, preventing
  injection via single-quote breakout or shell metacharacters
- Extract buildCreateUserCommand and buildDeleteUserCommand as pure
  testable functions
- Add tests with adversarial input (quotes, backticks, dollar signs)

TASK-05: Remove duplicate ctrl.GetConfigOrDie() call
- Replace second GetConfigOrDie() with mgr.GetConfig() which reuses
  the REST config already held by the manager

TASK-07: Fix silent status update errors across both reconcilers
- Replace all '_ = r.Status().Update(...)' with proper error logging
- 10 call sites fixed (5 in kopiabackup, 5 in kopiarepository)
- Status update failures are now logged instead of silently discarded

commit.message:
Fix iOS search: portal dropdown, debug logging, feedback with logs

- Fix search suggestions not tappable on iOS: render dropdown via React
  Portal to document.body (z-index 99999) to escape Leaflet's stacking
  context that was blocked by the mobile top bar overlay
- Add comprehensive debug logging across the entire search/autocomplete/
  fly-to code path (SearchControl, FlyToArea, AreaFilter, AreaSearch,
  CityChip, EventRow, App handleAreaClick)
- Add device info logging on mount (UA, browser, iOS/Android version,
  screen size, viewport, touch points, standalone mode)
- Add 'send debug log' button in Settings → Feedback that exports logs
  via Web Share API (iOS) or file download (fallback)
- Fix version tap for iOS: add onTouchEnd handler, larger tap target,
  increased timeout from 1.5s to 2s
- Track input focus state to skip first outside-tap when iOS keyboard
  was just dismissed (prevents premature search close)
- Expand logger.js with getEntries(), getDeviceInfo(), exportAsJSON(),
  exportAsText() utilities

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Optimize token cache remove path and add filter-first-clone flight for filtered retrieval, Fixes AB#3570409 (#3074)

Fixes
[AB#3570409](https://identitydivision.visualstudio.com/fac9d424-53d2-45c0-91b5-ef6ba7a6bf26/_workitems/edit/3570409)
`removeAccount()`/`removeCredential()` were triggering decrypt-all via
`keySet()` → `getAll()` just to check key existence. Adds a flight-gated
optimization for filtered retrieval and elapsed-time telemetry for
`deleteAccessTokensWithIntersectingScopes`.

## Changes

- **`removeAccount()` / `removeCredential()`**: Replace
`mSharedPreferencesFileManager.keySet().contains(cacheKey)` with O(1)
in-memory `containsKey()` on `mCachedAccountRecordsWithKeys` /
`mCachedCredentialsWithKeys`

- **Flight `ENABLE_FILTER_THEN_CLONE_IN_MEMORY_CACHE`**: When enabled,
`getAccountsFilteredBy()` / `getCredentialsFilteredBy()` filter directly
on uncloned in-memory references, then clone only matching items —
avoiding cloning records that will be filtered out. `getAccounts()` /
`getCredentials()` are unaffected and always return cloned lists.

- **Telemetry**: Add
`elapsed_time_cache_delete_access_tokens_with_intersecting_scopes` span
attribute in `MsalOAuth2TokenCache`; remove unused
`elapsed_time_save_account_shared_preferences`; add
`is_filter_then_clone_enabled` attribute in `getCredentials()`

- **Tests**: `KeySetTrackingStorage` wrapper asserts
`keySet()`/`getAll()` are never called during remove; flight on/off
tests verify clone-only-matching behavior for filtered methods

- **Changelog**: vNext `[PATCH]` entry `#3074`

---------

  and decomposePrompt (step 3 of task section) instructing agents to call
  write_journal after every meaningful task or conversation
- internal/orchestrator/orchestrator.go: add automatic fallback goroutine journal
  writes after successful Lead channel turns (len(tasks)==0) and after every
  successful DM turn — guarantees the diary is never empty even if the model
  does not call the tool

Result: every completed interaction now produces at least one journal entry;
agent-written entries are richer, auto-fallback entries ensure nothing is missed

feat: rewrite SELECT * as FROM-first DuckDB syntax (#21)

Implements the FROM-first formatting rule.

## What

`SELECT * FROM t` → `FROM t` (and `WHERE`, `ORDER BY`, etc. are
preserved)

## How

- Added `prefer_from_first: bool = True` to `JarifyConfig`
- Overrides `select_sql` in `JarifyGenerator`: when the only expression
is `*` and there are no JOINs, strips the `SELECT` line
- JOINs excluded: sqlglot re-parses `FROM func() JOIN` by attaching the
join to the table node rather than the Select, causing an idempotency
shift — keeping `SELECT *` for joined queries avoids this

## Tests

- `tests/fixtures/select/from_first` — simple, WHERE, ORDER BY cases
- `TestFromFirst` — star converts, JOIN keeps SELECT, DISTINCT keeps
SELECT, explicit columns unaffected, opt-out via config

Resolves #20

---------
